title: EllipticalCone Object
description: Transient elliptical cone. A transient elliptical cone is not displayed or saved in a document. A transient elliptical cone is used as a wrapper to work with raw elliptical cone information. A transient elliptical cone has no boundaries. The cone always goes to a point in its narrowing direction, and is infinite in its widening direction. They are created statically using the create method of the EllipticalCone class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this EllipticalCone object.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient elliptical cone object.

methods.name: getAxes
methods.description: Gets the center axis of the cone that defines its normal direction and the major axis direction of the ellipse that defines it.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Gets the data that defines the Elliptical Cone.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets the data that defines the Elliptical Cone.

methods.name: setAxes
methods.description: Sets the center axis of the cone and the major axis direction of the ellipse that defines it.

methods.name: transformBy
methods.description: Updates this surface by transforming it with a given input matrix.

properties.name: halfAngle
properties.description: Gets and sets the taper half-angle of the elliptical cone. A negative value indicates that the cone is narrowing in the direction of the axis vector, whereas a positive values indicates that it is expanding in the direction of the axis vector.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: majorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the major radius of the ellipse that defines the cone.

properties.name: minorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the minor radius of the ellipse that defines the cone.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: origin
properties.description: Gets and sets the origin point (center) of the base of the cone.

classType.title: EllipticalCone.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: EllipticalCone.copy Method
copy.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this EllipticalCone object.
copy.return_description: Returns a new EllipticalCone object that is a copy of this EllipticalCone object.

create.title: EllipticalCone.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient elliptical cone object.

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.core.EllipticalCone.create(origin, axis, majorAxisDirection, majorRadius, minorRadius, halfAngle)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::core::EllipticalCone::create(origin, axis, majorAxisDirection, majorRadius, minorRadius, halfAngle);

create.return_description: Returns the new EllipticalCone object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin point (center) of the base of the cone.

parameters.name: axis
parameters.description: The center axis (along the length) of the cone that defines its normal direction.

parameters.name: majorAxisDirection
parameters.description: The direction of the major axis of the ellipse that defines the cone.

parameters.name: majorRadius
parameters.description: The major radius of the ellipse that defines the cone.

parameters.name: minorRadius
parameters.description: The minor radius of the ellipse that defines the cone.

parameters.name: halfAngle
parameters.description: The taper half-angle of the cone.

getAxes.title: EllipticalCone.getAxes Method
getAxes.description: Gets the center axis of the cone that defines its normal direction and the major axis direction of the ellipse that defines it.

parameters.name: axis
parameters.description: The output center axis (along the length) of the cone that defines its normal direction.

parameters.name: majorAxisDirection
parameters.description: The output direction of the major axis of the ellipse that defines the cone.

transformBy.title: EllipticalCone.transformBy Method
transformBy.description: Updates this surface by transforming it with a given input matrix.
transformBy.return_description: Returns true if the transform was successful.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: A 3D matrix that defines the transform to apply to the surface.
